title: Apply workplace technical quality standards
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply workplace technical quality standards demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for inspection

pcs.text: Identify workplace materials and equipment required for inspection processes 1.2 Identify, tag and report damaged or unserviceable equipment 1.3 Identify and apply workplace instructions and quality guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace materials and equipment required for inspection processes 1.2 Identify, tag and report damaged or unserviceable equipment 1.3 Identify and apply workplace instructions and quality guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace materials and equipment required for inspection processes 1.2 Identify, tag and report damaged or unserviceable equipment 1.3 Identify and apply workplace instructions and quality guidelines.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for inspection

elements.title: Inspect work

pcs.text: Identify and apply job specification, work order, inspection processes and quality standards 2.2 Undertake workplace inspection processes against work quality goals2.3 Identify and follow work health and safety (WHS) requirements 2.4 Apply workplace quality standards when conducting inspections, according to workplace procedures2.5 Protect workplace materials and equipment against damage during inspection, according to workplace instructions and quality guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and apply job specification, work order, inspection processes and quality standards 2.2 Undertake workplace inspection processes against work quality goals2.3 Identify and follow work health and safety (WHS) requirements 2.4 Apply workplace quality standards when conducting inspections, according to workplace procedures2.5 Protect workplace materials and equipment against damage during inspection, according to workplace instructions and quality guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and apply job specification, work order, inspection processes and quality standards 2.2 Undertake workplace inspection processes against work quality goals2.3 Identify and follow work health and safety (WHS) requirements 2.4 Apply workplace quality standards when conducting inspections, according to workplace procedures2.5 Protect workplace materials and equipment against damage during inspection, according to workplace instructions and quality guidelines.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect work

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Inspect completed work to ensure quality outcomes against job specifications, and the achievement of customer requirements3.2 Complete and report work sheets and quality reports
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect completed work to ensure quality outcomes against job specifications, and the achievement of customer requirements3.2 Complete and report work sheets and quality reports?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect completed work to ensure quality outcomes against job specifications, and the achievement of customer requirements3.2 Complete and report work sheets and quality reports.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
